stemHtml: On the control panel for an airborne weather radar, there is a setting called "MAP", what is the function of this setting?

options.a: To assist navigation during the missed approach procedure.
options.b: To display a modified route based on detected areas of intense precipitation.
options.c: To display the weather returns as an overlay on a map on the Navigation Display.
options.d: To change the shape and orientation of the transmission beam down toward the ground.
